decisions.summary: Switch all non-Anthropic providers (kimi, minimax, zai, mimo, openrouter) from direct to claudish routing to fix 502 unknown provider errors in Claude Code v2.1.121

hazards.summary: Claudish does not natively auto-detect mimo models
hazards.mitigation: Use custom URL syntax https://token-plan-sgp.xiaomimimo.com/anthropic/<model> for mimo routing

hazards.summary: OpenRouter models need explicit or@ prefix in claudish
hazards.mitigation: getClaudishPrefix must add or@ prefix for models containing '/'

resumePoint.description: Implementing bead workspace-tzoh (switch providers to claudish) — providers.ts updated. Next: update getClaudishPrefix in agents.ts to handle new provider prefixes.

sessionHistory.note: Started implementation of PAN-964. No prior continue file. Creating beads and implementing fix for non-Anthropic model routing.
